posts.author: iszabo (Istvan Szabo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I was wondering if there was a way to combine column default with duplication.
What I’m trying to achieve is this:

  1. On the 1st day of the month, duplicate the top group in a board.
  2. When duplicating, duplicate only the values of selected columns, but for others, reset to default value.

Could this be done with existing automations?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @iszabo,

The Duplicates and Uniques app can help you out there. An example of how to do that is shown in the attached demo video.
In the video, the columns which have their “Include values” set to “No” are those that will maintain their default values
If you have any questions, you can reach out to support@kolaai.com
Loom | Free Screen & Video Recording Software | Loom

posts.author: iszabo (Istvan Szabo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
I understand Duplicates and Uniques is a paid app that would cost me extra on top of the existing Pro Monday subscription that I have now. Is that correct?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @iszabo,
Yes, that is correct
